candidates.description: Thermal scanning with Thermal Imaging camera, of all the cable and wiring joints in all the panels and MCB Distribution Boards after commissioning .

children.description: Providing & fixing in position 1000 mm wide, Electrical Insulating Mats as per IS 15652:2006, 2mm thick, suitable up to 3.3 KV, fire retardant,no effect of acids, alkalies and transformer oils, moistu...
Supply & fixing in position approved shock treatment chart written in English, Hindi and Local language. These charts shall be framed in wooden frame & covered with clear glass.
Supply & fixing in position the best quality danger notice boards of approved shape & size as reqd. by the local Electrical Inspecting Authority written in English, Hindi & local language.
Supply & fixing in position the Electrical A 1 Size SLD chart in the UPS/electrical room. These charts shall be framed in wooden frame & covered with clear glass.
Supplying the first aid box as approved by John Ambulance society.
